raw_consumer_statement: A charge of {$2800.00} was made to my Citibank double cash card in XXXX of XXXX. The charge was to the bookstore at the University XXXX XXXX XXXX  in XXXX, XXXX XXXX I neither made nor authorized the charge to be made. When the charge showed up on my statement, I called the company and disputed it. Citibank canceled that card and issues me a new one with a different number. Citibank initially removed the charge from my account. Later, I received notification from Citibank that the merchant was claiming that the charge was valid, and it was put back on my account. I requested any proof that they had, pursuant to their " investigation '', that the charge was valid. They said they would send it to me. After hearing nothing for a couple of weeks, I called the Citibank fraud department and they said again that they would send the information. That has probably been another ten days ago, and I have still received nothing. I attempted to contact Citibank again this morning, but I suspect that my account has been pushed to the bottom of the stack, because the computer says that I won't get a live person on the phone for at least 30 minutes.
